s1.title: Wall System
s1.description: Qingtai precision wall systems combine high-strength steel framing with versatile gypsum boards.

s2.title: Ceiling System
s2.description: Including aluminum baffles, mineral wool panels, and gypsum ceilings—practical and beautiful solutions for commercial and industrial spaces.

s3.title: Special Board System
s3.description: Special boards engineered for extreme environments: moisture-proof, mold-resistant, radiation-shielding, and ultra-hard options.

p1.title: Shanghai Tower Interior Partition Project
p1.description: This project used our high-strength steel framing system and A-class fire-resistant gypsum boards, covering over 50,000 m², achieving industry-leading seismic and fire performance in supertall buildings.

p2.title: Beijing Daxing International Airport Terminal Ceiling
p2.description: We delivered customized aluminum baffle ceiling systems with special fluorocarbon coating to ensure durability and aesthetics in high-traffic public spaces.

p3.title: Marina Bay Sands Hotel Expansion
p3.description: We provided complete acoustic and finishing solutions to meet the hotel’s high requirements for privacy and design aesthetics.

home.heroDesc1: Qingtai provides world-class framing, boards, and aluminum finishing systems.
home.heroDesc2: With precision manufacturing and global logistics, we support your vision.

consultation.title: Need professional material advice?
consultation.desc: Our engineering team provides technical support, material selection, and cost estimation.

logistics.label: Global Logistics
logistics.title: Global logistics & tracking
logistics.desc: We operate a global supply chain to ensure materials arrive safely and on time. With real-time tracking, you can monitor your order status anytime.

cards.title: Fast delivery response
cards.desc: Core cities within 24 hours; global delivery in 7–15 days.

cards.title: End-to-end quality monitoring
cards.desc: From dispatch to receipt, every step is quality-checked and digitally recorded.

about.profileHeading: Twenty years of focus, building beauty
profileParagraphs: Founded in 2006 and headquartered in Shanghai, China, Qingtai has been dedicated to R&D, production, and sales of partition and ceiling materials for two decades.
As a leading system solution provider, we deliver high-quality steel framing, gypsum boards, and aluminum finishes—backed by precise technical support and a reliable global logistics network.
Our products have been applied in over 1,200 landmark projects worldwide, including supertall buildings, international airports, five-star hotels, and large industrial facilities.

summary.title: Cost summary
summary.fillFirst: Please fill in destination country/port, procurement method, and all contact details on the left first.

cart.hint: Tip: Fill in all required fields and click confirm. The system won’t auto-quote while you type. After confirmation, an order will be created and a USD quote will appear on the right.
cart.waitingQuote: Required info is complete. Click “Confirm & submit order” on the left. After success, this panel will show the USD breakdown based on CBM and sync to Admin Orders.
cart.agreementNote: Submitting means you agree to the Material Purchase Agreement. Changing any info on the left will clear this quote and requires reconfirmation.
